steps.title: Backsolving choice B
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (20):
$$\text{Total flags} = \text{blue} + \text{yellow} = 20 + 20 = 40$$
Since the problem states there are 25 flags total, 40 ≠ 25, so choice B fails.

steps.title: Backsolving choice A
steps.content:
Fails. Testing choice A (5):
$$\text{Total flags} = 20 + 5 = 25$$
This matches the given total of 25 flags.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
